name: onslaught-career-editor-workspace
description: WinUI-first workspace for the Onslaught Toolkit.

scripts.test: dotnet build .\OnslaughtCareerEditor.WinUI.slnx --nologo && dotnet test .\OnslaughtCareerEditor.AppCore.Tests\OnslaughtCareerEditor.AppCore.Tests.csproj --nologo --no-build --no-restore --filter "FullyQualifiedName~AppCoreSaveOptionsContractTests|FullyQualifiedName~FileMutationSafetyTests|FullyQualifiedName~BinaryPatchCatalogContractTests|FullyQualifiedName~SafeCopyProfileCatalogContractTests|FullyQualifiedName~MissionScriptGoodieStateSaveCodecTests|FullyQualifiedName~MissionScriptSlotBitsetSaveCodecTests|FullyQualifiedName~SaveAnalyzerServiceTests" && dotnet test .\OnslaughtCareerEditor.UiTests\OnslaughtCareerEditor.UiTests.csproj --nologo --no-build --no-restore --filter "FullyQualifiedName~WinUiAccessibilityAuditTests"
scripts.test:tools: py -3 tools\aya_archive_inventory_tests.py && py -3 tools\export_game_assets_tests.py && py -3 tools\runtime_process_identity_test.py && py -3 tools\runtime_proof_lab_hygiene_test.py && py -3 tools\send_game_window_input_test.py && py -3 tools\start_cdb_server_test.py
scripts.release:winui-zip: py -3 tools\winui_lore_pack_builder.py --self-test && py -3 tools\winui_zip_package_probe_test.py && py -3 tools\winui_zip_package_probe.py --check --include-media-smoke
scripts.test:rebuild: npm run test:rebuild-core && npm run test:rebuild-client && py -3 .\rebuild\tools\cmsh_static_preview_tests.py && pwsh -NoLogo -NoProfile -File .\rebuild\tools\GodotToolchain.Tests.ps1
